purpose: Freeze validated production release after PRODUCT-RC-FINAL acceptance and PRODUCT-RC-DEPLOY-01 Netlify sync.

PRODUCT-RC-FINAL.note: Code/API RC PASS (30/30). At measurement time Netlify still served stale index-DSOnrqEK.js; corrected by PRODUCT-RC-DEPLOY-01.

PRODUCT-STUDIO-RA-01.note: Studio release-acceptance invariants validated on Studio track prior to STUDIO-07/08/09.

PRODUCT-STUDIO-09.feature: Bulk category confirmation flow via PATCH /api/reels/{id}/category

PRODUCT-STUDIO-10.result: No release blockers; scale CPU fine at N=50/100

knownLimitations: Bulk title update is not offered (no backend title PATCH; titles persist locally via reel_titles_persistent).
Bulk export remains a placeholder in Studio.
Rename persistence is client-local (survives refresh/restart in-browser; not a backend title field).
Production catalog size at freeze was 17 reels (not a large-scale dataset).
Local working tree contains unrelated WIP (backend/netlify/config drafts, reports, thumbs) excluded from this freeze.
Branch main is ahead of origin/main by 11 commits at freeze time; RELEASE-01 tag is local until explicitly pushed.
BG-7A milestone status historically listed Release Blocked for older credential gating; this RELEASE-01 freeze supersedes for the PRODUCT Studio RC track only.
